calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Oct-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for default prove up hearing against Defendant Spirit Cargo Inc. AKA Spirit Cargo Inc.

Dept. 504; Judge: Garrett Wong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:36:20 a.m. and concluding at 09:49:40 a.m.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. represented by Tiffanie Brown, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Spirit Cargo Inc. AKA Spirit Cargo Inc. not appearing.

BENJAMIN SEEMAN (Senior Collections Manager) appearing via Zoom Video Conference.
BENJAMIN SEEMAN IS SWORN TO TESTIFY ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF UNDER DIRECT EXAMINATION.

Court is directed to Amended Declaration Pursuant to C.C.P. Section 585 and Assignment and its attached exhibits.

THE FOLLOWING EXHIBITS ARE MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 1 - Standard Motive Contract
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 2 - E-mail regarding Charge Back and Invoice
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 3 - Third Party Claim Form

Counsel for Plaintiff presents interest, costs, and attorney fees calculation. Plaintiff requests attorney fee maximum for limited cases pursuant to Local Rule 6.6.

The matter is submitted.
Court finds that Plaintiff has satisfied its bourdon and executes the judgment in this matter by default. Judgment is entered in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. and against Defendant Spirit Cargo Inc. AKA Spirit Cargo Inc. as follows:

DAMAGES: $40,432.00
PREJUDGMENT INTEREST: $8,390.53
ATTORNEY FEES: $2,825.00
COSTS: $510.41

TOTAL JUDGMENT = $52, 157.94
Proposed judgment signed and filed in open court.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Oct-10-2025 Continued To Oct-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 504
